meta.title: Painting Events in Calgary | Mixler
meta.description: Join a painting event in Calgary and unleash your creativity. Fun, guided sessions for all skill levels. No experience needed, just show up and paint.

content.subtitle: Pick up a brush and paint something you're actually proud of.
content.intro: Painting events in Calgary have exploded in popularity, and for good reason. Whether you're a total beginner or someone who dabbles on weekends, a guided painting session is one of the most satisfying ways to spend an evening. You follow along, chat with people around you, and walk away with something you made yourself.

what_to_expect.heading: All supplies included
what_to_expect.body: Canvas, brushes, and paint are provided. Just show up ready to have fun.

what_to_expect.heading: Guided instruction
what_to_expect.body: A host walks you through the painting step by step, so no one gets left behind.

what_to_expect.heading: Social and relaxed vibe
what_to_expect.body: Most painting events have drinks flowing and music on. It's more of a hangout than an art class.

what_to_expect.heading: You take your art home
what_to_expect.body: Every attendee leaves with their own finished piece. It makes a surprisingly great gift too.

tips: Wear something you don't mind getting paint on, even if aprons are provided.
Don't stress about making it perfect. The fun is in the process, not the result.
Calgary winters are long, so a cozy paint night is a great way to get out of the house mid-week.
Going with a group? Painting side by side makes for a great photo at the end of the night.
Keep an eye on Mixler for upcoming painting events in Calgary. We list them as they're added and you can join the waitlist to hear first.
content.waitlist_heading: Want to know when we run painting events?
content.waitlist_body: Join the waitlist and we'll email you when we add one. We use this to plan what to run next.

faq.q: Do I need any experience to join a painting event?
faq.a: Not at all. Painting events are designed for beginners. The host guides you through every step of the painting.
Wear clothes you're okay getting a little paint on. Aprons are usually provided, but accidents happen.
Absolutely. Solo attendees are completely welcome. You'll be seated with other guests and it's easy to chat while you paint.

faq.q: How long does a painting event usually last?
faq.a: Most sessions run 2 to 3 hours, which is enough time to finish a painting without feeling rushed.
